<!-- RED: paste RED here -->
RED: T14 in scripts/test-gap-sweep.js (LIVE proj-t14 .cache/ + same-named kaola-workflow/archive/proj-t14/.cache/run-gaps.json, scan run with `--output` pointed at the archive copy) — pre-fix: `node scripts/test-gap-sweep.js` exited 1 with `FAIL: T14: scanner exits non-zero when --output targets a foreign/archived run-gaps.json while the live project dir exists`, `FAIL: T14: result = refuse, got swept`, `FAIL: T14: reason is a non-empty typed string, got undefined`, `FAIL: T14: the archived run-gaps.json must be byte-for-byte unchanged after the refused scan` (4 failures, 75 passed) — reproducing the clobber: the live scan silently overwrote the archived proj-t14/.cache/run-gaps.json.
<!-- GREEN: paste GREEN here -->
GREEN: Added a `runScan` guard in `scripts/kaola-workflow-gap-sweep.js` (~:190, right after `cacheDir` is computed, before any scan/mkdir/write): refuse with `{ result: 'refuse', reason: 'foreign_run_gaps_output', detail }` (stderr + exit 1 in non-JSON mode) whenever the resolved `--output` path's basename is `run-gaps.json`, it is NOT the scanned project's own `kaola-workflow/<P>/.cache/run-gaps.json`, AND a file already exists there — never touching (mkdir/write) any foreign/archived artifact. Post-fix `node scripts/test-gap-sweep.js` → "gap-sweep tests passed (79 assertions)" (T14 refuses `foreign_run_gaps_output` with the archived file byte-unchanged; new T15 proves a normal explicit `--output` at the project's own `.cache/run-gaps.json` still writes as before — no over-refusal; all prior T1-T13 including the #675 `project_archived` T12/T13 pair still pass unchanged). Hand-ported the identical guard (rename-normalized) into `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-gap-sweep.js` and `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-gap-sweep.js`; regenerated the codex twin via `node scripts/edition-sync.js --write`. `node scripts/edition-sync.js --check` → "10 forge aggregator ports, 24 COMMON_SCRIPTS mirrors, and 27 byte-identical groups in parity with canonical" (clean; only-diff between canonical/gitlab/gitea copies is the pre-existing filename/usage-string rename). `node scripts/validate-script-sync.js` → "OK: 24 common scripts, 27 byte-identical groups, 8 rename-normalized families, 2 hooks.json families (config + hooks dir), and 7 forge export-superset families in sync." `node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js` → exits 0, "Workflow walkthrough simulation passed".
